data.name: MILF In Space
data.detailed_description:
MILF in Space is a choice-driven adult visual novel that transforms an impossible situation into an intimate journey of connection. When you and Elena your best friend's skeptical mother are mysteriously teleported to an abandoned alien vessel, every choice you make will shape not just your survival, but the very nature of your relationship.

Important Note:

Updates will be added fairly frequently enhancing on the preexisting planets and scenes. 

Story

One moment you're at a sleepover. The next, you're waking up on the bridge of the derelict starship Nebula Drifter, millions of light-years from home. Elena blames you, seeing you as the irresponsible gamer who corrupted her son. Stranded together in the vastness of space, you'll need each other to survive.

As you explore the vessel and discover an ancient alien artifact granting mysterious powers, your relationship begins to evolve. Will you become her emotional anchor in this terrifying new reality? Will the tension between you ignite into something more primal? Or will you forge an equal partnership built on mutual respect?

Features:

  •  Deep Storyline

  •  Deep Character Development

  •  Choices

  •  Nudity

data.short_description: You and your best friend's mom are mysteriously teleported to an abandoned alien spaceship. Use your sci-fi knowledge to survive while building an unlikely relationship in this adult visual novel.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7
  • 處理器: 1.8GHz Dual-Core CPU
  • 記憶體: 3 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Integrated graphics
  • 儲存空間: 6 MB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
